case_title: TOKUHIRO SHIMOYAMA VS. BRYCE BEAMER et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT BRYCE BEAMER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. AN AMENDED COMPLAINT WAS FILED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR #5976

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BRYCE BEAMER'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OF TOKUHIRO SHIMOYAMA. OVERRULED. LIBERALLY CONSTRUED, THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT STATES SUFFICIENT FACTS TO SUPPORT ALL OF THE CLAIMS ALLEGED THEREIN. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF TOKUHIRO SHIMOYAMA'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES AND FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. NO PURPOSE WOULD BE SERVED BY REQUIRING FURTHER DETAILS THAT DEFENDANT STATES CANNOT BE RECOLLECTED. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. MR. HASSAN MUST PROVIDE VERIFICATION FOR THE FOURTH AMENDED RESPONSE TO INTERROGATORIES BY 12:00 NOON ON SEPT. 11, 2013 UNLESS THE PARTIES AGREE TO A LATER TIME. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED.

Mtn To Compel Further Answers To Interoggs And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-10-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. GEOFFREY ROTWEIN, TEL. NO. 397-0860 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. REY HASSAN, TEL. NO. 775-9700 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TOKUHIRO SHIMOYAMA's Motion To Compel Further Answers To Interrogatories And For Sanctions is Denied. No purpose would be served by requiring further details that defendant states cannot be recollected. The request for sanctions is denied. Mr. Hassan must provide verification for the Fourth Amended Response to Interrogatories by 12:00 noon on Sept. 11, 2013 unless the parties agree to a later time.
ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported.

Mtn To Compel Further Answers To Interoggs And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-27-2013 Continued To Sep-10-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on TUE-AUG-27-2013:
Geoffrey Rotwein, Esq. [415.397.0860] appearing for TOKUHIRO SHIMOYAMA, plaintiff / moving party;
Rey Hassan, Esq. [415.775.9700] appearing for BRYCE BEAMER, defendant / opposing party

Defendant's counsel will not stipulate to have this matter heard by a judge pro tem. The matter is argued. Plaintiff TOKUHIRO SHIMOYAMA'S Motion to Compel Further Answers to Interrogatories and for Sanctions is continued to September 10, 2013 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. Judge Pro Tem: James P. Watson; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Off Calendar Aug-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: appearances: geoffrey rotwein, esq., 415.397.0860, for plaintiff shimoyama.
joseph sweeney III, esq., 914.646.3884, for defendant beamer.

RULING: no argument. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BRYCE BEAMER'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT of tokuhiro shimoyama. Overruled. Liberally construed, the First Amended Complaint states sufficient facts to support all of the claims alleged therein. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella; Not reported
